response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist (web, mobile, embedded, DLang, Node/TS) but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role: no recent or substantial C++ on Windows (only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL/generic SQL only), and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure. Their financial-adjacent role at RIDE Capital was a Node/TypeScript/GraphQL stack, not C++ or fixed-income systems. Not a fit for a C++/Capital Markets consulting engagement.
strengths: Senior engineer with 10+ years across diverse stacks and strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a professional engineering IDE product
Strong communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months in 2014–2015) and not on a modern Windows capital-markets stack
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets domain experience

key_factors.factor: No Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain
